selection_policy.purpose: Post-amendment floor re-probe of the frozen 18-task suite. The spec amendments and verifier rework of 2026-07-05 invalidated the floor calibration recorded in task.toml files; this run re-measures floor one-shot pass rates so sizes can be reassigned per the SPEC.md calibration bands (small 70-100%, medium 30-70%, large 0-40%).
notes: One-shot mode is expressed as verifier_submission_cap 1 on the fixed repair-loop runner so the probes run on the exact harness that produced the clean preview data.
Calibration rollouts are excluded from published leaderboard results per panel policy.
Frozen snapshot commit: the tasks in this plan must not change while this recalibration is in flight or its results are void.
